mock.heading: Privacy Policy Overview
mock.description: SouthStar Energy Services LLC respects your privacy and is committed to complying with this privacy policy.

items.title: What Information Do We Collect?
items.content:
We may collect certain identifying information from or about you in connection with your use of, or your submissions to, the System.

  • First and last name
  • Email address
  • Utility account number
  • Payment information

items.title: Cookies and Usage Reports
items.content: By placing a small file known as a cookie on your computer, SouthStar and its third party service providers passively gather information about visitors use of the System.

items.title: How Can I Opt-Out of Promotional Correspondence?
items.content: We may send you emails with promotional offers. If you would no longer like to receive emailed special offer information, please click the link at the bottom of any promotional email.

items.title: Online Account Management
items.content: If you elected to subscribe to any online services provided via the System, you will be required to submit personal information for the purpose of verifying your identity.

items.title: What is a fixed rate plan?
items.content: A fixed rate plan locks in your price per CCF for the duration of your contract, protecting you from market fluctuations.

items.title: Can I switch plans before my contract ends?
items.content: Yes, you can switch plans. Early termination fees may apply depending on your current plan terms.

items.title: How long does enrollment take?
items.content: Enrollment typically takes 5-7 business days to process. You will receive a confirmation email once your new plan is active.
